scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,user,room,character -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w gateway" "npm run dev -w user-service" "npm run dev -w room-service" "npm run dev -w character-service"
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,user,room,character -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start -w gateway" "npm run start -w user-service" "npm run start -w room-service" "npm run start -w character-service"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w gateway && npm run typecheck -w user-service && npm run typecheck -w room-service && npm run typecheck -w character-service
